creator: xxjack12xx@gmail.com
text:
libx264 is missing distinfo

/usr/ports/multimedia/libx264 # ls
Makefile        pkg-plist


/usr/ports/multimedia/libx264 # make
===>  License GPLv2 accepted by the user
===>   libx264-0.159.2999 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
=> x264/example.y4m.bz2 is not in /usr/ports/multimedia/libx264/../x264/distinfo.
=> Either /usr/ports/multimedia/libx264/../x264/distinfo is out of date, or
=> x264/example.y4m.bz2 is spelled incorrectly.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/multimedia/libx264
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/multimedia/libx264
